# Security Policy

To report a security issue, please use [this form](https://forms.gle/8aQEmz7LFtFHqk8U6).

We'll conduct an **initial analysis**, and based on the severity of the vulnerability, we will take one of two decisions:

- **If it is of low severity**: we will create an Issue and provide the community with the opportunity to contribute to the correction; or
- **If it is of high severity**: we will work on an internal fix and submit a PR with the correction.

The form includes the option to identify yourself or remain anonymous, aiming to give credit to the vulnerability reporter.
**Authors of corrected reports who choose to identify themselves will be acknowledged in a specific section in the project's README.**
